name: Chinese Reusable Space Vehicle
description:
First Chinese reusable spacecraft, apparently a spaceplane with wings per a photo taken by a US satellite. No public information of it is available.

Its official name is "Chongfu Shiyong Shiyan Hangtian Qi", meaning "Reusable Experimental Spacecraft".

Note: It is unknown how many flight vehicles have been built and flown.
